title: Fruity MiddleEastern Salmon Crumble
description: A sweet and crumbly salmon dish with peach glaze and nutty oat crust, perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium heat.
In a bowl toss the salmon cubes with olive oil, cinnamon, sea salt, and peanut juice, then let marinate for 10 minutes.
In a separate bowl mix rolled oats and chopped almonds.
Spread the oat‑almond mixture on a parchment lined grill pan and press firmly to form a crust.
Place the marinated salmon cubes on top of the crust and grill for 15 minutes, turning once, until the salmon is opaque and the crust is golden.
Remove from the grill and drizzle the remaining peach juice and a little honey over the top.
Let the dish cool, then refrigerate for meal‑prep portions.
Serve chilled or reheated to enjoy the sweet, crumbly texture.
